title: Ezhu Velaikkara Lyrics Velaikkaran 2017
stanzas:
ezhu vaikaikkara indre indre
ini seiyum velai nandre
ada melum keezhum ondre ondre
varalaarai maatru vendre.

poraadu
ezhu vaikaikkara indre indre
poraadu
ini seiyum velai nandre

ada melum keezhum ondre ondre
varalaarai maatru vendre.

mudiyaadha seyal yaadhume

balamirundhum puriyaamale

orumuraiye

uzhaippavane ezhudhida

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ezhu Velaikkara'?

The song conveys themes of hard work and perseverance, encouraging listeners to strive for their goals.

How does 'Ezhu Velaikkara' fit into the plot of the movie?

In Velaikkaran, the song reflects the protagonist's journey and his aspirations to make a difference in society.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Sidharth Mahadevan and composed by Anirudh Ravichander.

When was 'Ezhu Velaikkara' released?

The song was released on December 21, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ezhu Velaikkara', the protagonist's drive and ambition are beautifully encapsulated through vibrant beats and powerful lyrics. The song serves as a motivational anthem, urging listeners to pursue their dreams relentlessly. It evokes a sense of energy and enthusiasm, making it perfect for celebrations and workouts. The collaboration between Sidharth Mahadevan and Anirudh adds a unique flair, making this track a standout in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ezhu Velaikkara from Velaikkaran is an electrifying anthem that captures the spirit of ambition and determination. With Anirudh's pulsating beats and Sidharth Mahadevan's dynamic vocals, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the vibrant energy of this track that resonates with the youth's aspirations!
stanzaMeanings: Don't close your mouth, don't be silent.
This is the work that will be done from now on, it will change the past.
You are the country that needs to be protected. The wind will blow when you speak.
Don't be silent, don't be lazy, don't be quiet.
Don't be lazy, don't fall down. Don't be lazy.
Don't be silent, don't fall down. Don't be lazy.
Don't be lazy, this is the work that will be done from now on.
It will change the past.
No action can be done on this earth without rising up like a storm.
We have to rise up without understanding the consequences, we have to rise up slowly.
Life that lives in the world is a way of living that is useful.
The worker must write the decision. If the one who is born is hungry, it is not wrong anywhere.
Don't be silent, don't be lazy, don't be quiet.
Don't be silent, don't fall down. Don't be lazy.
Don't be lazy, this is the work that will be done from now on.
It will change the past.
You are the country that needs to be protected. The wind will blow when you speak.
Don't be silent, don't be lazy, don't be quiet.
Don't be silent, don't fall down. Don't be lazy.
Don't be lazy... don't be lazy... don't be lazy... don't be lazy... don't be silent... don't be quiet, don't close your mouth.
